title: Barriers to communication
summary: 9609 A Level — noise, language, culture, and structural barriers.

simpleExplanation.title: When messages fail
simpleExplanation.summary: Barriers include language differences, poor technology, information overload, status gaps, and physical distance.

sections.content: **Barriers** (7.2.4) is standard **10-mark analysis**. Name **barrier → effect → solution** for the case.
